summary: Frontend-only verification completed for /auth and shared typography/header updates. Mobile rendering at 320/375/430 passed overflow checks and key auth controls loaded. Remaining regressions are console request errors and lingering decorative font usage outside auth/public scope.

ui_bugs.issue: Console still logs repeated REQUEST FAILED net::ERR_ABORTED module loads during /auth render.

integration_issues.issue: Decorative fonts are still referenced in multiple routes/components and legacy Playfair/JetBrains stylesheet is still injected from root head.

action_items: Fix /auth runtime request abort churn (net::ERR_ABORTED) so public auth route has clean console output.
Remove remaining Playfair Display and JetBrains Mono inline fontFamily usages across app routes/components.
Remove legacy Google Fonts stylesheet for JetBrains Mono + Playfair from src/routes/__root.tsx.
Provide /app/memory/test_credentials.md (missing) for authenticated-route visual verification in follow-up runs.
critical_code_review_comments: Requirement 'remove old decorative font wherever used' is not fully met: code search shows many surviving Playfair/JetBrains references.
Root head still loads Playfair/JetBrains Google fonts, which conflicts with full-site Geist-only typography objective.
Shared LargeTitle implementation is compliant: no literal 'Aegis vault' eyebrow/line and sticky blurred background is present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Confirmed /auth renders at 320/375/430 without horizontal overflow and with Geist sans in hero heading. CSS variables --font-serif and --font-mono are not present in src/styles.css. Remaining blockers are console request failures on /auth and unresolved decorative font references in non-auth routes/components.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: load http://localhost:8080/auth in browser automation with console capture. Multiple dynamic module requests abort (net::ERR_ABORTED) while Vite reconnects, creating non-clean console output on the public auth route. Separate code-level RCA: global typography migration is incomplete because legacy font families are still hardcoded in several authenticated screens/components and old font stylesheet remains in root head.
